name: Joyeria Luanda Cash Inc
description_short: Joyeria Luanda Cash Inc 2 is a Miami-based pawn shop specializing in jewelry, watches, and gold buying with repair services and layaway plans available.
description_long:
Joyeria Luanda Cash Inc 2 operates as a neighborhood pawn shop located in Miami, Florida at 10308 W Flagler Street. The business appears to be part of a local business directory and marketing platform (MiamiDirect.us) rather than a standalone independent operation, though it maintains its own phone line and physical storefront presence in the Miami area. The company is listed as a verified member of the MiamiDirect.us business network with an owner-published profile.

The shop offers a range of services centered on jewelry and precious metals transactions. Core services include pawn shop lending against jewelry collateral, buying and selling jewelry, gold buying, watch repair, watch battery replacement, jewelry repair, and layaway plans. They accept multiple payment methods including cash, Mastercard, and Visa. The business maintains a primary contact person listed as Mirta Berrocal and can be reached at +1 305 559 0205.

Joyeria Luanda Cash Inc 2 distinguishes itself through extended hours of operation, opening as early as 4:00 am on Saturdays and 6:00 am on weekdays, catering to customers who may need quick cash or jewelry services outside standard business hours. The business also maintains an online presence with a separate website (joyerialuandacashinc2.com) in addition to its directory listing. The shop explicitly advertises jewelry repair and watch services alongside pawn lending, positioning itself as a full-service jewelry establishment rather than a basic collateral lender.

As a pawn shop, this business serves the immediate liquidity needs of Miami residents who own jewelry or watches. However, customers should understand that pawn lending typically involves higher interest rates and shorter redemption periods than traditional loans, and jewelry offered as collateral will be sold if not redeemed within the agreed timeframe. The unusually early opening hours and specific focus on jewelry suggest the business may serve a niche customer base with particular scheduling needs or cultural preferences.
pros: Extended early morning hours (opens 4:00 am Saturday, 6:00 am weekdays) for immediate cash access
Multiple payment method acceptance including cash, Visa, and Mastercard
Offers repair services (jewelry repair, watch repair, watch batteries) in addition to pawn lending
Provides layaway plans as an alternative to pawn lending
Local neighborhood presence with established contact person and verified business listing
Specialized in jewelry and precious metals with dedicated gold buying service
Maintains both physical storefront and online presence for customer convenience
cons: Pawn lending typically carries high interest rates and short redemption periods compared to traditional loans
Website primarily functions as a directory listing rather than providing detailed terms, rates, or loan calculator
No visible information about redemption periods, interest rates, or loan terms on their profile
Hours are unusually limited (closes by 9:30 am at latest on weekdays), not true 24/7 or extended evening access
Minimal transparency about jewelry valuation process or how loan amounts are determined
best_for: Miami residents needing immediate cash against jewelry or watch collateral
Customers seeking jewelry or watch repair services combined with pawn options
Early morning workers or shift workers who need access during non-standard business hours
Individuals with jewelry or gold items seeking buyer options with same-day transactions
diagnosis: Joyeria Luanda Cash Inc 2 is best suited for Miami-area customers who own jewelry or watches and need immediate liquidity, particularly those with scheduling constraints requiring early morning access. The primary caveat is that pawn lending involves collateral risk and typically higher costs than traditional loans, with jewelry subject to sale if redemption deadlines are missed; customers should verify specific terms and interest rates before pledging items.
services: Pawn shop lending against jewelry collateral
Pawn store operations with cash advances
